permissions.purpose: Read customer records to display customer data and enable AI-driven customer insights
Create and update customer records through natural language commands
View charge details and history for payment analytics and reporting
Create charges through AI-driven payment workflows
Read invoice data to display billing history and enable invoice search
Create, finalize, and send invoices through natural language commands
View subscription details for recurring billing management
Create and cancel subscriptions through AI-driven billing workflows
Read product catalog to display available products and pricing
Create and update products in the Stripe catalog
View price and plan details for subscription and billing management
Create and configure pricing plans through the Jeriko CLI
View payment intent status to track payment flows
Create and confirm payment intents for payment processing
View payout history and status for financial reporting
Initiate payouts through the Jeriko CLI
View account balance for financial overview and reporting
Read Stripe events for webhook processing and activity monitoring
View checkout session data for payment flow tracking
Create checkout sessions for hosted payment pages
View payment links for sharing and tracking
Create payment links through natural language commands
